question: Will a NBA player get suspended in the remainder of the NBA playoffs?
textDescription:
Resolution criteria

This market resolves to YES if at least one NBA player (on either the spurs thunder knicks or cavaliers) is suspended for any game(s) during the remainder of the 2026 NBA playoffs (including the Conference Finals and NBA Finals). A suspension is defined as an official announcement by the NBA league office stating that a player is ineligible to participate in one or more games due to disciplinary action.

If no NBA player is suspended for the remainder of the 2026 playoffs, the market resolves to NO.

Official announcements from the NBA Communications department (https://pr.nba.com/) will serve as the primary source of truth. Suspensions occurring after the conclusion of the final game of the 2026 NBA Finals do not count.
